commands.name: report
commands.description: reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process

options.name: --process-id
options.description: The process id to report the stack.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the process to report the stack.

commands.name: ps
commands.description: Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.

commands.name: symbolicate
commands.description: Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

options.name: --search-dir
options.description: Path of multiple directories with assembly and pdb [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/xdg-config|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/nuget-packages|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/xdg-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/nuget-http-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/tool|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/dotnet-home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/xdg-data|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-7ac9815d979f43c1b5917b1dc54ee775/xdg-runtime]

arguments.name: INPUT-PATH
arguments.description: Path to the stacktrace text file
